aliases: local S3 development with MinIO Docker
MinIO standalone and distributed Docker setup

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: RELEASE.2025-05-24: embedded admin console removed from Community Edition

constraints: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD must be at least 8 characters; use a strong, randomly generated password in production
Standalone mode is for development/evaluation only -- use distributed mode (minimum 4 nodes, 4 drives) for production
Port 9000 is the S3 API port and port 9001 is the Console UI port -- both must be explicitly mapped in Docker Compose
Always pin to a specific release tag (RELEASE.YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM-SSZ), never use :latest in production
As of RELEASE.2025-05-24, the web admin console was removed from Community Edition -- use mc CLI or the separate object-browser image

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need AWS S3 service configuration, not self-hosted S3
Need Kubernetes MinIO deployment, not Docker Compose
Docker container won't start or crashes

inputs_needed.question: Do you need standalone (single node, dev/test) or distributed (multi-node, production) mode?
What programming language will connect to MinIO?
